localizations.title: The Path of the Katana
localizations.hint_51_first: This letter will guide you on your journey to Kamakura Fortress.
localizations.hint_51: The entrance to the village of Kamakura forms a number.
localizations.hint_96_first: Observe the symbol visible outside the residence (56). Guide the koi within the pond so they form the same pattern.
localizations.hint_96: If a koi touches one of the pond's walls, it is pushed back in the opposite direction.
localizations.hint_19: Your route from the top-right tower to your mistress' chambers will spell a word representing a number.
localizations.hint_20_first: Play the music for each season using your flute. The notes are visible underneath each section of the branch on the scroll (10).
localizations.hint_20: Colors can be combined to produce new ones, such as those found on the scroll (10).
localizations.hint_84_first: You need to apply one of your samurai values to resolve this conflict.
localizations.hint_84: Both men claim to be merchants from Kamakura, but only one has an item a genuine merchant would possess. Therefore, the other is lying.
localizations.hint_35_first: You received a flower during your adventure. Therefore, Dame Koda is looking for a flower of the same color.
localizations.hint_35: You can exit the chambers through the window and go back to the rooftops.
localizations.hint_14_first: You can use something in your possession to scale this tower.
localizations.hint_14: Place your weapons so they are aligned with the yellow marks. A mathematical equation will become visible.
localizations.hint_43: You need to demonstrate that you follow one of your samurai values, just as your mistress would.
localizations.hint_60: You need to demonstrate one of your samurai values to show your loyalty to Dame Koda.
localizations.hint_32: A number is hidden in this text. The sentence "With every line of this message, take one step forward" will help you find it.
localizations.hint_91: Follow the instructions provided by the two men you've encountered, adjusting your surroundings as you see fit.
localizations.hint_91_part2: The various locations have a layout similar to one you've seen previously during your adventure.
localizations.hint_68: You need to apply one of your samurai values to confront your opponent.
localizations.hint_3_first: You need to apply one of your samurai values to resolve the situation without resorting to violence.
localizations.hint_3: Avoid deception, and show the servant the item that motivated your visit to the fortress.
localizations.hint_47_first: When the lights are off, a number becomes visible.
localizations.hint_47: What do you see once the lights are turned off?
localizations.hint_101_first: You need to apply one of your samurai values to help this monk.
localizations.hint_101: Show kindness to the monk by giving him something.
localizations.hint_machinefin_first: Your opponent always performs the same sequence of movements. When he stays still, try to be opposite him.
localizations.hint_machinefin: Your opponent performs a specific move for each attack. Memorize each one to anticipate his intentions.
localizations.answer_hint_51: Dame Koda wrote in her letter that the Kamakura fortress has a unique feature; namely, a symbol resembling two K's facing each other above the entrance. When you draw that shape, the number 101 appears.
localizations.answer_hint_96: Guide the three koi so they come together to form the symbol visible in the pond. Touch the spaces next to each fish to push them away.
localizations.answer_hint_19: If you trace the path from the tower in the top-right of the card to the window from which light is escaping, you'll pass through the letters T, H, R, E, and E, spelling the number 3.
localizations.answer_hint_20: Play the different seasonal melodies by pressing the holes on the flute. To combine colors, press multiple holes at the same time. First, play summer's tune by pressing these notes: yellow, blue, green, then red. Next, play autumn's tune by pressing red, blue, purple (red and blue together), then yellow. After that, play winter's tune by pressing blue, orange (red and yellow together), red, followed by cyan (green and blue together). Finally, play spring's tune by pressing green, yellow, cyan (green and blue together), and finally black (all the notes together).
localizations.answer_hint_84: To stop the two men from arguing, press the dedicated button, select Justice, and scan the card. Then, designate the culprit. The monk (74) claims to have given blue talismans to the merchants of Kamakura. However, the man in yellow has a red talisman, which means he is not a merchant. Select the yellow character.
localizations.answer_hint_35: The flowers mentioned by the servant are the same as the one you found (80). This must mean that Dame Koda visited the spot with red flowers near the entrance to the fortress. Traversing the rooftops (19), if you start at the lit window and move toward the red flowers, your route will cross the letters S, I, X, T, and Y, which spell out the number 60.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Place the kunai so that each tip overlaps a yellow cloth. This will reveal 8, +, and 11: 8 + 11 = 19.
localizations.answer_hint_43: To show your devotion to your mistress, press the dedicated button. To select the appropriate value, refer to the text written by Dame Koda (51) and choose the value that best aligns with politeness. Select Respect and scan the card.
localizations.answer_hint_60: To decline Yoru's demand, press the dedicated button, select Loyalty, and scan this card. This gives you a red +60, which you can combine with your katana to attack him (+8): 60 + 8 = 68.
localizations.answer_hint_32: If you advance one letter in each line of the message, you can read the number FIFTY SIX.
localizations.answer_hint_91: Follow the instructions provided by both the Katana master (8) and the thief (87). Press each window to close all the shops, then bring the sun down so that night falls.
localizations.answer_hint_91_part2: The stones in the sand maze (24) are arranged in the same pattern as the locations on the map. Select these locations in the same sequence as the stones within the maze: bottom right, bottom left, top left, top right, center left, center right, bottom center, and finally center.
localizations.answer_hint_68: Press the dedicated button to fight your opponent, then select the Courage value, and scan this card.
localizations.answer_hint_3: To explain the situation to the servant, press the dedicated button, select Honesty, and scan this card. This gives you a red +3, which you can combine with the letter you received from your mistress at the start of your adventure +32: 3 + 32 = 35.
localizations.answer_hint_47: Place your fingers over the lights to block them. By doing so, you will see the number 14.
localizations.answer_hint_101: To help the monk, press the dedicated button, select Generosity, and then scan this card. This gives you a red +13, which you can combine with the coins (61). Give them to him. 13 + 61 = 74.
localizations.answer_hint_machinefin: Use the attack and jump actions to move your character so that they are at one space or less away from your opponent when they are not taking any action. You can attack in his direction and parry his projectiles. Be careful to remember your opponent's stances, as these indicate what his next move will be when he uses his smoke bomb.
localizations.machine_20: While you were playing the flute, an arrow with a message attached flew across the room and lodged itself into the wall.
localizations.machine_91: You reach the fortress of Kamakura.
localizations.machine_96: A chest is visible at the bottom of the pond.
localizations.machine_sabre_end: After defeating Yoru, you rescue your mistress, Dame Koda, and return the stolen katana to her. Your honor is restored, and you resume your service to her. You rise to become the most renowned samurai in Japan under the most powerful ruler.
localizations.amulet_card_84_result: You recognize the deceitfulness of your former friend. You confront him to understand his actions.
localizations.amulet_card_68_result: You show courage and battle Master Yoru!
localizations.amulet_card_101_result: You show generosity and provide enough for this monk's needs.
localizations.amulet_card_43_result: You emulate Dame Koda and bow your head to greet her former teacher.
localizations.amulet_card_3_result: You can be honest with this servant and show her the reason for your visit.
localizations.amulet_card_60_result: You refuse to betray your mistress.
localizations.machine_20_badseason: Although the melody is harmonious, it does not correspond to the current season.
localizations.machine_91_part1: You sneak through the streets of Kamakura to reach the fortress, but you need to avoid the patrols.
localizations.machine_91_open: You have other things to do besides just waiting here.
localizations.intro_1: After a long day, your mistress invited you to sit down and have a cup of tea.
localizations.intro_2: You both fell asleep, and a shadowy figure entered the room.
localizations.intro_3:
When you awoke, the katana was gone. 
You were held responsible for the theft and banished from the estate.
